personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior Front End Engineer | React & Next.js
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Product-focused Front End Engineer specializing in React 19, Next.js 15, and TypeScript. Passionate about building highly interactive, accessible, and performant user interfaces. Adept at state management (Zustand), optimistic UI updates (TanStack Query), and complex browser API integrations (Web Audio, WebRTC) to deliver seamless, native-like web experiences.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Free access to the EU job market.

experience.title: Senior Front End Engineer
responsibilities: Advanced UI Architecture: Developed highly responsive, client-facing interfaces using React 19 and Next.js 15, consistently achieving 90+ Lighthouse performance scores.
Browser API Integration: Integrated the Web MediaRecorder API for real-time voice processing and applied custom interactive DOM transformations (ePub.js) for immersive reading.
State & Animations: Engineered optimistic UI updates via TanStack Query and built complex, interactive data visualizations using Chart.js and Framer Motion.
Quality Assurance: Authored comprehensive E2E test suites using Playwright, including custom auth-bypass mechanisms to streamline CI/CD pipelines.

experience.title: Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Enterprise UI Development: Built and deployed production-ready web applications from scratch using Next.js and React, while developing new interactive features for existing enterprise dashboards.
System Migration: Spearheaded the migration of legacy views into modular, reusable Next.js components, establishing a scalable and accessible frontend architecture.
State & Performance: Implemented strict state management (Zustand) and caching strategies, significantly reducing client-side rendering bottlenecks in large-scale applications.
Conversion Optimization: Collaborated directly with UX/UI designers to implement responsive design patterns, increasing mobile usability and engagement metrics.

projects.name: Lexity: Interactive Language Ecosystem
projects.description: Built a PWA featuring an interactive ePub.js book reader wrapping individual words in interactive spans, paired with seamless optimistic UI updates.
projects.stack: React 19, Next.js 15, TanStack Query, shadcn/ui, ePub.js

projects.name: Interly: Real-Time Audio Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a real-time coaching dashboard visualizing WPM pacing and filler words using Chart.js, Framer Motion, and the Web Audio API.
projects.stack: TypeScript, Zustand, Web Audio API, Chart.js, Framer Motion

projects.name: ZIRO.FIT: Geospatial Discovery UI
projects.description: Engineered a location-based discovery engine utilizing Leaflet.js, alongside a complex multi-view analytics dashboard for personal trainers.
projects.stack: Next.js, Leaflet.js, Radix UI, Tailwind CSS, Playwright

education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
